value.found_quote: The user types a request in the GE chat. GE calls your agent's A2A endpoint and sends along GE's own A2UI catalog — the list of UI components GE knows how to render.
value.rationale: The page describes integration between agents and Gemini Enterprise (GE) via the A2UI/A2A protocol, rendering rich UI within GE's own chat surface. However, the page makes no mention of driving agents from third-party chat or issue-tracking tools such as Slack, Linear, or other external channels. The chat surface discussed is exclusively Gemini Enterprise's own chat interface. The specific claim of "Chat-surface integration (Drive the agent from chat/issue tools (Slack, Linear, channels))" is not substantiated anywhere on this page.
